title: 2026 Maryland Governor and Lieutenant Governor Election
office: Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland
description: Maryland will elect its governor and lieutenant governor on November 3, 2026; the two offices are elected together on a single ticket. The race is being held in a state that recent nonpartisan ratings describe as solidly Democratic, and the incumbent governor, Wes Moore, is seeking re-election. The contest matters because it will determine control of the state executive branch and test whether Moore’s first-term record and the Democratic lean of the state outweigh Republican efforts to make the race about taxes, affordability, and public safety.

candidates.name: Wes Moore
candidates.summary: Wes Moore is Maryland’s incumbent governor and is seeking a second term. Before entering elected office, he served in the U.S. Army, led nonprofit and philanthropic organizations, and became a best-selling author; as governor, he has emphasized economic opportunity, education, child poverty reduction, and public safety.

summary_sources.title: Our Leadership - Office of Governor Wes Moore
Meet Wes - Wes Moore for Maryland

career_history.title: Governor
career_history.description: Serves as Maryland’s 63rd governor.

career_history.title: CEO
career_history.description: Led one of the country’s largest anti-poverty organizations before entering office.

career_history.title: Founder and leader
career_history.description: Launched and led an education-focused nonprofit aimed at improving first-year college success.

career_history.title: Paratrooper
career_history.description: Served in the Army and led soldiers in Afghanistan.

candidates.name: Aruna Miller
candidates.summary: Aruna Miller is Maryland’s lieutenant governor and is running for re-election on the Democratic ticket with Wes Moore. Her background is in civil and transportation engineering, and in elected office she has focused on transportation, STEM education, working families, and public safety-related issues.

summary_sources.title: Biography - Lt. Governor - Our Leadership - Office of Governor Wes Moore
Wes Moore & Aruna Miller for Maryland

candidates.name: Dan Cox
candidates.summary: Dan Cox is a Republican candidate for governor and a former member of the Maryland House of Delegates. He previously represented District 4, worked as an attorney and teacher, and was the Republican nominee for governor in 2022.

summary_sources.title: Daniel L. Cox, Maryland State Delegate

career_history.description: Served on the Judiciary Committee and related subcommittees.

career_history.description: Served as chief of staff to a Pennsylvania state senator.

career_history.description: Taught at a Christian family school in Maryland.

candidates.name: Ed Hale
candidates.summary: Ed Hale is a Baltimore businessman and former banker running for governor as a Republican after previously identifying as a Democrat. His campaign emphasizes taxes, regulation, business competitiveness, and public safety, and he presents himself as a non-career politician with private-sector experience.

summary_sources.title: Hale cites pragmatism as he switches party affiliation to run for governor

career_history.title: Founder / chairman / chief executive
career_history.description: Built and led a Baltimore banking business.

career_history.title: Businessman
career_history.organization: Shipping, banking, and real estate ventures
career_history.description: Campaign materials describe him as having built businesses and buildings and employed thousands of Marylanders.

career_history.title: Owner
career_history.description: Known publicly as the owner of the Baltimore Blast soccer team.

career_history.title: CIA operative
career_history.description: Hale has said he worked covertly for the CIA for nearly a decade.

candidates.name: Andy Ellis
candidates.summary: Andy Ellis is the Green Party candidate for governor and is running with Owen Silverman Andrews on the ticket. He is a longtime debate coach and civic activist in Baltimore, and his campaign biography says he has worked on education, debate programs, and local political organizing for years.

summary_sources.title: Andy Biography | Get Involved Today - Andy Ellis For Governor 2026
